summary: All ten table rows verified compositionally: exact config equality binds each Claude/Codex event to its callback argv, real subprocesses against a live HTTP server plus in-process hook.main bind argv to the resulting turn write (incl. live-background Stop = no write, i.e. unchanged), and pi's real rendered extension runs under node asserting agent_end->user, input->agent via PUT .../turn; any swapped mapping breaks an equality assertion.
